name: tei
description: Skill for operating tei via the lab MCP server / CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Use Hugging Face Text Embeddings Inference for embeddings and reranking.
interface.longDescription: TEI provides workflows for checking Text Embeddings Inference health, embedding text, tokenizing input, and reranking documents against a query.
defaultPrompt: Use TEI to embed this text.
Check TEI health and model info.
Rerank these documents for this query.
